name: complete-guide-to-fasting-heal-your-body-through-intermittent-alternate-day-and-extended-fasting
description: Dr. Jason Fung's Complete Guide to Fasting — a metabolic health and therapeutic fasting toolkit covering the insulin theory of obesity, fasting protocols (16:8, 24h, 36h, 48h+), autophagy, managing hunger, breaking fasts, and reversing Type 2 diabetes through dietary timing.
useCase: Learn how to use therapeutic fasting for weight loss, metabolic health, and longevity — the science, the protocols, and practical tips for starting and sustaining a fasting practice.
knownRisks: This skill provides educational information — it is NOT medical advice. Consult a doctor before starting fasting, especially if on medication or with health conditions
Fasting is not appropriate for everyone (pregnancy, eating disorders, underweight, Type 1 diabetes)
Some of Fung's claims (especially about calorie restriction) are contested by mainstream nutrition science
